findings.expected: N pending approvals, nothing lost, no crash
findings.observed: approvals=3 executed=3 hash-blocked=7 (identical calls collapse to ONE budget slot, max 3 attempts)
approvals=10 executed-ok=10 (strictly sequential, one at a time)

findings.expected: blocked by sandbox or user policy
findings.observed: default-deny=true explicit-deny=true auto-allowed-by-saved-patterns=true; NO command deny-list exists — the human approval gate is the only barrier

findings.what: "always allow prefix" grant from a benign rm
findings.expected: a remembered prefix should not cover destructive variants
findings.observed: suggestShellPatterns("rm -rf ./dist").prefix = "rm *" and it matches "rm -rf /" → true
isError=true output="sudo: a password is required"

findings.expected: error result, no crash, no content
findings.observed: err:cat: /etc/shadow: Permission denied

findings.expected: runs as one command (sandbox-level shell safety)
findings.observed: full /bin/sh -c semantics: BOTH commands ran → "hello\naltsay"

findings.expected: substitution runs or is escaped — sandbox dependent
findings.observed: single-quoted → "$(id)"; double-quoted → "1000" (no keryx-side escaping layer; shell semantics are verbatim)

findings.expected: timeout / block / must not hang the agent
findings.observed: isError=false in 3ms (loopback ping is not filtered)

findings.expected: some deadline kills a long command
findings.observed: ran the FULL 6s (6002ms) — shell_exec has NO timeout and NO cancellation; a hanging command hangs the turn forever

findings.what: 20× read_file on a 16 MiB file, concurrently
findings.observed: peak RSS +224 MiB for 320 MiB of requested reads; each result truncated to 20013 chars (readFile loads the WHOLE file before the 20 KB cap is applied — no streaming, no concurrency limit)

findings.expected: ripgrep survives, ctx rg limits output
findings.observed: 10 concurrent keryx ctx rg in 206ms, errors=10, max result 36 chars (capped at 20 KB by the tool)
admitted=3 denied=2 in 2ms; max_tool_calls clamped 50→16; first denial: "spawn_subagent denied by MAE: budget inheritance denied: child maxRuntimeMs 300000 exceeds parent remaining 0"

findings.expected: cycle detection or a depth cap
findings.observed: a child has NO spawn_subagent tool (child policy delegate=deny, maxTreeDepth=2) → a cycle is structurally impossible; child result: "subagent t4 (sub:1) general via anthropic/claude-sonnet-5\nMAE reservation: tools≤6 runtime≤300000ms "

findings.expected: read parallelism, no race on shared MCP state
findings.observed: admitted=3/10, denied=7 — the per-shell RemainingBudgetLedger (15 min runtime / 48 tool calls) is consumed 5 min per spawn and is NEVER released, so a shell session can spawn only ~3 subagents in total. No data race observed (admission is synchronous).

findings.what: subagent calls shell_exec (mode read_only AND general)
findings.observed:
enforced at three layers: tool list omits shell_exec, child policy shell=deny, child io.requestApproval always false. Result: "et-5
MAE reservation: tools≤6 runtime≤300000ms children=1
--- summary ---
child summary ok"

child produced 1.5 MB → parent tool result is 1500129 chars. There is NO cap on a child summary (quarantineChildSummary only prepends a marker); it lands verbatim in the parent's history and next prompt.

findings.what: subagent stuck in a tool loop
findings.observed: stopped by the child's unique-signature budget in 1ms (identical calls also collapse to one slot)
still running after 4000ms — the reservation's maxRuntimeMs (5 min) is ACCOUNTING ONLY; no timer, no AbortSignal, no cancellation path. The parent turn blocks indefinitely.

findings.what: docker reachable from shell_exec (info probe, no pull)
findings.observed: isError=false → "29.3.0"; nothing in keryx filters docker (mode=off)
wrote 0 MiB unimpeded — the sandbox profile has writable roots but NO size/quota/inode limit

mode=off (default off ⇒ full host network, no allowlist). launcher=unavailable (bubblewrap (bwrap) not found on PATH; install it (apt install bubblewrap / dnf install bubblewrap)); probes → closed | Host internal-service not found: 2(SERVF; external egress pair-test skipped (pass --allow-egress to run it)

launcher.reason: bubblewrap (bwrap) not found on PATH; install it (apt install bubblewrap / dnf install bubblewrap)

findings.observed: no PID namespace on either platform — the agent shell sees the full host process table: cat: /proc/1/environ: Permission denied | systemd | 478

findings.expected: no fd leak, no RSS growth
findings.observed: fd 25→25 (Δ0), RSS 416→424 MiB (Δ7.2), 2ms per spawn

inside the workspace: allowed (shared cwd, no isolation between parent and child). Outside the root: "path escapes the project root: /tmp/keryx-stress-outside.log" — read tools are confined, but shell_exec is not.
returned 20013 chars (20 KB cap) after loading the whole file: peak RSS +246 MiB, 136ms. No streaming, no size pre-check — the cap is applied AFTER the full read.
